elements.text:
You are sitting on the bus and see your friend get on. They walk past you and sit with another friend.

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I am annoyed that my friend doesn't want to sit with me, but I know that this situation will pass.
I am happy that my friends are happy.
I am courageous for sitting on my own.
I am upset thinking that my friend is mad at me, but I know I should not assume the worst.
I feel mad at my friend for not sitting with me.
